zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugolina de Gernon於1026年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet38歲，母親Agnes O'Connor21歲。她於大約1054年與Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire在法國諾門迪奧內賽結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1077年2月2日在英國坎布利其爾沃特貝亞其享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugolina de Gernon于1026年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet38岁，母亲Agnes O'Connor21岁。她于大约1054年与Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire在法国諾門迪奧內賽结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1077年2月2日在英国坎布利其爾沃特貝亞其享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugolina de Gernon was born in 1026, in Normandy, France, her father, Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet, was 38 and her mother, Agnes O'Connor, was 21. She married Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire about 1054, in Sai, Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 February 1077, in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugolina de Gernon est née en 1026, à Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes O'Connor, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire environ 1054, à Sai, Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1077, à Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugolina de Gernon 1026 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet 38 und ihre Mutter Agnes O'Connor 21. Sie hat um 1054 in Sai, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1077 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugolina de Gernon è nata il nel 1026 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Agnes O'Connor, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire circa 1054, nel Sai, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 febbraio 1077, nel Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugolina de Gernonが1026年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichetは38歳，母Agnes O'Connorは21歳であった。約1054年にフランスノーマンディオルンサイでPicot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1077年2月2日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアワテルベアチで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugolina de Gernon(이)가 1026년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes O'Connor(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1054년 프랑스 노먼디 른 사이에서 Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1077년 2월 2일 영국 캄브리지실르 왓르브이치에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clun, Shropshire, England: Clun, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugolina de Gernon nasceu em 1026, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes O'Connor, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire aproximadamente 1054, em Sai, Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1077, em Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugolina de Gernon родилась в 1026 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes O'Connor, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire около 1054 г. в местности сеи, орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 февраля 1077 г. в местности вэитирбич, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugolina de Gernon nació en 1026, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes O'Connor, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire aproximadamente 1054, en Sai, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1077, en Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
